name: radar-chart
description: Radar/spider chart with concentric grid and 1–2 filled series.

meta.props: { data?: RadarSeries[]; width?: number; height?: number }
meta.dataShape: { name: string; data: { axis: string; value: number }[] }[]  // 1–2 series
meta.example: <RadarChart data={[{ name: 'v2', data: [{ axis: 'Speed', value: 82 }, { axis: 'Cost', value: 58 }] }]} />
